violations.text: The dishwasher failed to wash his/her hands between loading soiled and unloading clean dishes from the dishwasher. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils.Inspector informed employee of proper hand-washing while handling clean and dirty equipment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The presence of (rodents and cockroaches ) is not controlled as evidenced by (dead mouse and dead cockroaches on glue traps and droppings thrughout kitchen area ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
Inspector observed plates of cooked bacon and sausages stacked on top of each other without any cover. PIC wrapped plates in plastic. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
(Ice machine lid ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Broken/damaged lid. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (dishwasher). New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves in basement and kitchen) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The (walls ) in the (basement ) area is in poor repair. Observed the border of the walls damaged, missing, and/or holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2024

The floors throughout kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Raw animal foods (raw, whole shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cut potatoes) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
Buckets of olives were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

A bowl is being used as a scoop in a container of sugar. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The following items were observed in poor repair: -Lid on ice machine -Gaskets on low-boys Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
The ice machine is lacking an air gap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The following items were observed in poor repair: -ceiling tiles in mop sink area -coving missing and holes in wall junctures in basement -floor tiles in kitchen The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated that repair service has been scheduled for 3/21/2024. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink at the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food, debris and residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized; ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Raw whole shell eggs were observed held at 54 degrees Fahrenheit on counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, eggs were out for approximately 1 hour, eggs were moved to refrigeration during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Sausage and cheese were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Buckets of olives were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Containers of potatoes in the walk-in were observed not covered, with containers stacked over each other. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
Celery was observed stored touching the fan guards in the reach-in refrigerator. Staff trimmed and covered celery during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of flour and sugar. Shaker cup was used as ice scoop at the bar. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. Ice was disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
The following items were observed in poor repair: -Lid on ice machine -gaskets on prep unit low boys New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine and quaternary ammonium sanitizing solutions for the dish machine and 3-bay sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
Ice machine is lacking an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The following areas were observed in poor repair:-ceiling tiles in the mop sink area-coving missing and holes at wall junctures in basement-floor tiles in kitchenThe physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
